en: Go, go, go, go. Go, go, go.
ko: 가, 가, 가, 가, 가, 가, 가, 가, 가, 가, 가, 가!

en: Get off him. He doesn't know what he's doing. He's American.
ko: 그 사람에서 떨어져. 그는 뭘 하고 있는지 몰라. 그는 미국인이야.

en: American? No. Just look at me.
Jean Parmesan, how you doing? Jean, what the hell are you doing?
Don't get up. I just find the supplies.
ko: 일어나지 마. 나는 그냥 물건을 찾고 있어.

en: Because I'm a private detective, Jean Parmesan, how are you doing?
Ah! Jean! Oh, Jean! Isn't he the best?
Jean was far from the best. Jean Parmesan, right here.
ko: 진은 결코 최고가 아니었어. 진 파르마산?

en: It's just some idiot with balloons. Oh, is it?
Ah! I knew it! Uh, I've got some bad news. I'm...
Jean Parmesan, how you doing? He got me again!
But I did overhear that he's bleeding internally.
ko: 하지만 그가 내부 출혈이 있다고 들었어.
